title: DennettExplained
description: In this interview, Professor Daniel Dennett discusses his philosophical roots, his thoughts on Freud, predictive processing, psychedelics, consciousness, and ancient Athens. Dennett argues that philos...
abstract: In this interview, Professor Daniel Dennett discusses his philosophical roots, his thoughts on Freud, predictive processing, psychedelics, consciousness, and ancient Athens. Dennett argues that philosophers have the ability to criticize and contribute to the science of the mind, and speaks to the virtues of cross-disciplinary glances and hybrid vigor. He discusses potential scientific and therapeutic value of psychoactive substances within proper settings.
